sessions.comment: okay the flames plus the smiley face on a coffin set is genuinely so good this is 100% a save for later set. do people book from your grid a lot?
this before and after is so satisfying! the layers changed the whole look. do people usually come in knowing they want this or do you figure it out together?
do you understand how gorgeous these are!! do clients come in asking for the chocolate french specifically or do you end up suggesting it
7 years in SF is seriously impressive. coming out the other side and still talking about your team like this says a lot! congrats on 7!! 💖
